name: Almond Mushroom Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt margarine.
2. Add onion, garlic, and mushrooms. Saute until tender but not browned.
3. Add tarragon and stir until it is softened.
4. Pour the mixture into a bowl of food processor.
5. Add remaining ingredients. Process until the mixture is smooth.
6. Add cheese if you prefer a more spreadable consistency.
7. Spoon into a serving bowl.
8. Top with garnish of your choice (slivered or finely chopped almonds, fresh parsley sprigs, pimiento strips, or sweet red pepper strips).
Makes 1 1/2 cups. People who do not like ordinary pate seem to love this one. Vary the herbs and substitute vegetables as you wish. Serve with water crackers, thick slices of crusty French bread, thin slices of whole wheat bread, or unsalted whole wheat crackers. May be frozen. Variations: - Substitute other vegetables for the mushrooms (e.g., broccoli). - Substitute 1/2 teaspoon fennel for the tarragon and 1 cup whole pecans for the almonds. - Vary flavor by using other seasonings such as basil, oregano, dillweed, curry powder, or nutmeg.
